calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Gena Eales.
Appearances:
Michael Bruno, Esq. for Plaintiff JMT Leasing, Inc. dba Thrifty Car Rental present by James Tennant, V.P., was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the Defendant Alex Bennett as follows: Damages in the amount of $37,920.37, Attorney's fees of $1,250.00, Costs of $264.50 and Interest of $8,176.93. For the total of $47,611.80.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2003 Continued To Jan-30-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
